title: formal-ai with: auto-start temp --agent-mode server + disable summarization + temp-config-only + broaden tool coverage (claude/qwen/grok/aider) by default
docs: add an agentic CLI tools testing guide (fixtures, logging proxy, phrasing matrices, marker assertions)
File reading broken in agent mode: 0/12 read dialogs work (no read-tool routing; filenames parsed as URLs; cat refused while ls works)

agent-mode: natural-language file-listing requests return 'could not determine' instead of a bash tool_call (4/10 phrasings fail)

with-formal-ai: gemini fails by default (cached OAuth overrides wrapper env; needs api-key auth + workspace trust)

Universal multi-protocol API server: support OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Vertex shapes under /api/<protocol>/ (move OpenAI routes to /api/openai/v1)
